---
title: "彰化縣住宅屋齡深度分析"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyr)

# Load data using the manifest
manifest <- fromJSON("data/latest/manifest.json")
csv_path <- file.path("data/latest", manifest$dataFiles$county)

# Read CSV, skip the header row that contains descriptions to get English column names (if available) or handle manually
# The original CSV has two header rows. We'll read the first as names.
raw_data <- read_csv(csv_path, locale = locale(encoding = "UTF-8"), skip = 1)
# The first row of data is actually the Chinese headers from the second row of the CSV
# Let's map them to something useful
names(raw_data) <- c("ID", "Name", "Total", "AvgAge", "Y1", "Y1_5", "Y5_10", "Y10_15", "Y15_20", "Y20_25", "Y25_30", "Y30_40", "Y40_50", "Y50plus", "Time")

# Filter for Changhua
ch_data <- raw_data %>% filter(grepl("彰化", Name))
```

## 縣市數據摘要

目前資料期別：**`r ch_data$Time`**

彰化縣總住宅數為 **`r format(ch_data$Total, big.mark=",")`** 宅，平均屋齡為 **`r ch_data$AvgAge`** 年。

```{r summary_metrics}
# Prepare data for plotting
buckets <- ch_data %>%
  select(Y1, Y1_5, Y5_10, Y10_15, Y15_20, Y20_25, Y25_30, Y30_40, Y40_50, Y50plus) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "Age", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Age = factor(Age, levels = c("Y1", "Y1_5", "Y5_10", "Y10_15", "Y15_20", "Y20_25", "Y25_30", "Y30_40", "Y40_50", "Y50plus"),
                     labels = c("1年以下", "1-5年", "5-10年", "10-15年", "15-20年", "20-25年", "25-30年", "30-40年", "40-50年", "50年以上")))
```

## 屋齡分布圖形化

### 各級距戶數比例

```{r pie_chart}
p1 <- plot_ly(buckets, labels = ~Age, values = ~Count, type = 'pie',
              textinfo = 'label+percent',
              insidetextorientation = 'radial',
              marker = list(colors = colorRampPalette(c("#AED9E0", "#5E6472"))(10))) %>%
  layout(title = "彰化縣住宅屋齡分布比例",
         xaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE),
         yaxis = list(showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE, showticklabels = FALSE))

p1
```

### 屋齡階梯圖

```{r bar_chart}
p2 <- ggplot(buckets, aes(x = Age, y = Count, fill = Count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#90e0ef", high = "#0077b6") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "各屋齡區間住宅宅數", x = "屋齡區間", y = "宅數") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,驱动 = 1))

ggplotly(p2)
```

## 全台縣市比較 (彰化定位)

我們將彰化縣與全台其他縣市進行平均屋齡比較。

```{r comparison}
comp_data <- raw_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(AvgAge)) %>%
  arrange(AvgAge)

p3 <- ggplot(comp_data, aes(x = reorder(Name, AvgAge), y = AvgAge, fill = Name == "彰化縣")) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#e63946", "FALSE" = "#a8dadc"), guide = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "全台各縣市平均屋齡比較", x = "縣市", y = "平均屋齡")

ggplotly(p3)
```

***

*本報告由 R Markdown 自動生成，原始數據來源：內政部社會經濟資料服務平台 (SEGIS)。*
